zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Fullwood於大約1519年出生在英國瓦維其可爾阿斯頓 坎特洛福時，他的父親Robertus Fullwood45歲，母親Margareta Mitton42歲。他於1539年與Maria Hunt在英國瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1576年10月6日在英國瓦維其可爾蕾托 阿爾內享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Fullwood于大约1519年出生在英国瓦維其可爾阿斯頓 坎特洛福时，他的父亲Robertus Fullwood45岁，母亲Margareta Mitton42岁。他于1539年与Maria Hunt在英国瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1576年10月6日在英国瓦維其可爾蕾托 阿爾內享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fullwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands): habitational name from a lost place called Fulwood near Clay Hall in Tanworth in Arden, Warwickshire or from one or more of the other places so called, such as Fulwood in Ecclesall (Yorkshire), Fulwood (Lancashire), Fulwood in Sutton in Ashfield (Nottinghamshire), and Fullwood Farm in Hulland (Derbyshire). From Old English fūl ‘dirty, muddy’ + wudu ‘wood’.

variants.name: Fullard
meanings: In some cases possibly an altered form of German Vollert, Fullert, or Füllert: from the personal name Volhard, Vollhardt (from Old High German Volkhart, a compound of volc ‘tribe, people’ + hart ‘bold’).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Fullwood was born about 1519, in Aston Cantlow, Warwickshire, England, his father, Robertus Fullwood, was 45 and his mother, Margareta Mitton, was 42. He married Maria Hunt in 1539, in Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 6 October 1576, in Little Alne, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 58.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Fullwoodが約1519年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストン カントロウで生まれた時，父Robertus Fullwoodは45歳，母Margareta Mittonは42歳であった。1539年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでMaria Huntと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1576年10月6日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアリットル アルンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Fullwood(이)가 대략 1519년 영국 워윅실르 애스턴 캔틀로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robertus Fullwood(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Margareta Mitton(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1539년 영국 워윅실르에서 Maria Hunt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1576년 10월 6일 영국 워윅실르 리틀 알니에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Fullwood родился около 1519 г. в местности астон кантлоу, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robertus Fullwood было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margareta Mitton, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Hunt в 1539 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 6 октября 1576 г. в местности литл алн, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.
